Our Rector Prof. Dr. Atilla Arkan Reappointed as the Rector of Our University

11.07.2025

Prof. Dr. Atilla Arkan has been reappointed as the Rector of our university by a Presidential Decree signed by the President of the Republic of Türkiye, Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

Prof. Dr. Atilla Arkan has been reappointed as the Rector of Ibn Haldun University with the approval of the President of the Republic of Türkiye, Recep Tayyip Erdoğan. The official decision regarding his appointment was published in the Official Gazette on July 10, 2025, and has entered into force.

We congratulate our Rector, Prof. Dr. Atilla Arkan, and wish him continued success in his role, which he has held since 2021.
